name: New York Mortgage Trust Inc. 9.125% Senior Notes Due 2030
summary: New York Mortgage Trust, Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on investing in mortgage-related assets, including residential mortgage-backed securities (RMBS), multifamily CMBS, and other real estate-related investments. The company seeks to generate attractive risk-adjusted returns through strategic asset allocation and active portfolio management. NYMTG represents a series of senior notes issued by the company.
